prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical street portrait of a young East Asian woman standing in a narrow old alley on a bright sunny day. She leans lightly against a rough, weathered gray plaster wall on the right side of the frame, shown from mid-thigh upward in a 2:3 vertical composition. She has very long straight dark brown-black hair falling over her shoulders and down past her waist, fair skin, delicate natural makeup, and a calm contemplative expression as she gazes upward toward the sunlight. Her right hand is raised to her forehead to shade her eyes, while her left arm hangs relaxed by her side. Dress her in a soft casual outfit: a fitted light gray camisole tank top, a sheer cream cardigan with sleeves pushed to the elbows, and a flowing off-white long skirt; include a small woven straw shoulder bag partly visible behind her hip. The setting is an aged pedestrian lane with stone paving, potted green plants along the wall, distant old building facades, a red lantern hanging in the blurred background, and strong midday sunlight casting crisp highlights and shadows. Use natural colors, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, soft cinematic bokeh, high detail, 35mm documentary fashion photography style, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical street portrait of a young East Asian woman standing in a narrow old alley on a bright sunny day. She leans lightly against a rough, weathered gray plaster wall on the right side of the frame, shown from mid-thigh upward in a 2:3 vertical composition. She has very long straight dark brown-black hair falling over her shoulders and down past her waist, fair skin, delicate natural makeup, and a calm contemplative expression as she gazes upward toward the sunlight. Her right hand is raised to her forehead to shade her eyes, while her left arm hangs relaxed by her side. Dress her in a soft casual outfit: a fitted light gray camisole tank top, a sheer cream cardigan with sleeves pushed to the elbows, and a flowing off-white long skirt; include a small woven straw shoulder bag partly visible behind her hip. The setting is an aged pedestrian lane with stone paving, potted green plants along the wall, distant old building facades, a red lantern hanging in the blurred background, and strong midday sunlight casting crisp highlights and shadows. Use natural colors, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, soft cinematic bokeh, high detail, 35mm documentary fashion photography style, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张写实风格的竖版街头人像，画面主体为 一位年轻的东亚女性，她站在一个明媚晴天的狭窄古老巷弄中。她轻靠在画面右侧粗糙、风化的灰色灰泥墙上，采用 2:3 的竖构图，展示从大腿中部以上的身体。她留着非常长的直发，深棕黑色头发 垂落在肩头并延伸至腰部以下，皮肤白皙，妆容精致自然，神情平静沉思，抬头望向阳光。她的右手抬起遮在额头前以遮挡阳光，左臂自然垂在身侧。为她穿上一套柔和的休闲装：一件修身的浅灰色吊带背心，一件袖子推至肘部的米色薄开衫，以及一条飘逸的米白色长裙；在臀部后方隐约可见一个小巧的编织草编单肩包。背景是一个铺着石板路的古老步行巷，墙边摆放着盆栽绿植，远处是古老的建筑外墙，模糊的背景中挂着一个红灯笼，强烈的正午阳光投射出清晰的高光和阴影。使用自然色彩、浅景深、真实的皮肤纹理、柔和的电影级虚化效果，高细节，35mm 纪实时尚摄影风格，无文字，无水印，无无关人员。
